title: FTBChecker
description: FTB Checker is a mod that ensures the presence of FTB mods in your modpack. If any of these mods are missing, a warning screen will be displayed before entering the main menu, providing download links for the missing mods.
body:
# FTB Checker

FTB Checker is a mod that ensures the presence of popular FTB mods in your modpack. It checks for FTB Chunks, FTB Library, FTB Quests, and FTB Teams. If any of these mods are missing, the mod displays a screen before entering the main menu, providing download links for the missing mods.

FTB Checker was originally created for my [CreateCore Reforged](https://modrinth.com/modpack/createcore/) modpack. The mod was developed to ensure the seamless integration of FTB mods within the modpack while adhering to the licensing requirements of the Modrinth platform.

Recognizing its potential utility for other modpack creators facing similar challenges I decided to release FTB Checker as a standalone mod. This allows other modpack creators to easily incorporate the essential FTB mods into their projects while maintaining compatibility with the Modrinth platform.


## Features

- **Automatic FTB mod check**: FTB Checker automatically detects if any of the essential FTB mods are missing from your modpack.
- **Download links**: If any FTB mods are missing, the mod will display a screen with download links for the missing mods, making it easier for players to obtain them.
- **Modrinth compatibility**: Designed for modpack creators who want to use FTB mods and host their modpacks on the Modrinth platform. Due to licensing restrictions, FTB mods cannot be used on Modrinth directly.


![Mod showcase](https://i.imgur.com/LJZVfmG.png)


## Support

If you encounter any issues or have questions, please visit our [GitHub repository](https://github.com/SajmonOriginal/FTBChecker) to report issues, or join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/xpZJAF86Xp) for community support.

## ⚠️ Disclaimer ⚠️
FTBChecker is not affiliated with or endorsed by FTB (Feed The Beast) or Modrinth.
